name: Immune+ Q3
copy: Feeling run down? Northwind Immune+ is clinically proven to boost your immune system. 9 out of 10 users felt healthier in two weeks. Tap to claim your free trial.
claim: Clinically proven to boost your immune system; 9 out of 10 users felt healthier.
imagePrompt: A bright, energetic flat-lay of Northwind Immune+ supplement bottles with fresh citrus and eucalyptus, warm morning sunlight, clean wellness aesthetic.
substantiation: Two randomized controlled trials (n=240 and n=180) on the Immune+ formula; typical-results data on file.
